commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch teaches Ollama discovery to use resolved `discoveryApiKey` values for non-local cloud providers, preserves local marker auth, and adds focused provider-discovery regressions plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can return the `OLLAMA_API_KEY` marker instead of the real resolved credential for documented Ollama Cloud config. I did not run executable tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the automerge path should gate the exact head checks and any maintainer-requested live Ollama Cloud smoke.
